highlights.text: Phi Phi speedboat, Alcazar Show & Coral Island
Chao Phraya dinner cruise & Safari World

itinerary.title: Thailand Premium Family Tour
itinerary.tagline: Bangkok • Pattaya • Phuket • Phi Phi Islands
itinerary.overview: Comprehensive 8-day Thailand Discovery — Phuket Phi Phi speedboat, Pattaya Alcazar and Coral Island, Bangkok temples, Chao Phraya cruise, and Safari World.
itinerary.seo_title: TH-005 | Thailand Premium Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 07N/08D Thailand family package (TH-005): Phuket, Phi Phi, Pattaya, Coral Island, Bangkok temples, and Safari World.

days.title: Phuket Arrival
days.description: Warm Thai welcome at Phuket Airport. Transfer to premium beachfront resort. Welcome sunset dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Coastal transfer, Patong Beach leisure
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: Curated Welcome Dinner

days.title: Phuket to Phi Phi Islands
days.description: Private speedboat to Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, Bamboo Island, Viking Cave, and Monkey Beach.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private speedboat Phi Phi tour
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Beachside Island Lunch

days.title: Phuket City Exploration
days.description: Big Buddha, Wat Chalong, Old Phuket Town, Karon Viewpoint. Sunset at Phromthep Cape.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Big Buddha, Wat Chalong, Old Phuket Town, Phromthep Cape
Overnight Stay: Phuket (Premium Luxury Beachfront Resort)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Traditional Thai Fine Dining

days.title: Phuket to Pattaya
days.description: Flight to Bangkok and drive to Pattaya. VIP Alcazar Cabaret Show with front-row seats.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Domestic flight transit, Alcazar Show VIP entry
Overnight Stay: Pattaya (Premium Ocean View Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Indian Culinary Buffet Dinner

days.title: Pattaya Coral Island
days.description: Private speedboat to Coral Island with parasailing and banana boat. Fresh seafood lunch.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private speedboat Coral Island, parasailing, banana boat
Overnight Stay: Pattaya (Premium Ocean View Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Premium Seafood Lunch

days.title: Pattaya to Bangkok
days.description: Wat Traimit Golden Buddha and Wat Pho. Grand Pearl Chao Phraya dinner cruise.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Wat Traimit, Wat Pho, Grand Pearl dinner cruise
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Ultra-Luxury Riverside Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Premium Cruise Dinner

days.title: Bangkok Family Fun & Shopping
days.description: Safari World & Marine Park. ICONSIAM luxury shopping.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Safari World drive, marine park shows, ICONSIAM
Overnight Stay: Bangkok (Ultra-Luxury Riverside Hotel)
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast & Safari World Buffet Lunch

days.title: Bangkok Departure
days.description: Final breakfast. Private transfer to Suvarnabhumi International Airport.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private airport departure transfer
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in handpicked premium hotels across Phuket, Pattaya, and Bangkok
Dedicated luxury van for all transfers and tours
Private speedboat to Phi Phi Island and Pattaya Coral Island
VIP Alcazar Show and Grand Pearl Chao Phraya dinner cruise
Safari World & Marine Park full-day admission
Thailand visa fees and personal expenses
